algorithms are the base of programming
let me explain what they are
algorithms are a sequence of detailed
step-by-step instructions
in programming algorithms are written by
programmers so that a machine can do a
task
it's like a recipe where a machine has
to follow all the steps carefully
the machine starts by receiving an input
it can be a number or phrase or whatever
you can think of then it'll process the
algorithm that means it will perform all
the steps that we've indicated in the
code to produce a result
this result is called output
for example when we bake the input is
the ingredients and the output is the
baked cake can you guess what the
algorithm would be I told you before
exactly
the algorithm would be the recipe itself
since it's a sequence of steps required
to turn the ingredients into a delicious
dish
programming is very important
